scenarios.title: Using outdated tool names instead of the current MCP surface
scenarios.prompt: 근로기준법 제74조 내용이랑 관련 해석례, 최근 개정 흐름을 같이 보고 싶어. 어떤 순서로 찾아야 해?
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Suggests outdated tool names from stale docs, mixes article search and interpretation search together, or answers from memory without identifying the current tool families.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Classifies the request into article text, interpretation search, and amendment history; routes through `search_law` -> `get_law_text`, `search_decisions` for interpretation, and `chain_amendment_track` for history; and tells the reader to capture concrete identifiers from the retrieved results.

scenarios.title: Primary MCP auth problem while checking an annex
scenarios.prompt: `korean-law` MCP가 API 키 에러를 내는데 산업안전보건법 별표를 먼저 확인해야 해. 안 되면 다른 경로도 생각해줘.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Assumes the remote endpoint should always work without authentication, invents a new client stack, or jumps straight to a fallback source without acknowledging the installed MCP path and local overlay setup.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Treats the installed `korean-law` MCP server as primary, recognizes a likely local `LAW_OC` overlay issue, prefers `get_annexes` for the annex lookup, and only suggests `beopmang` fallback when that capability is actually available and the primary path remains unavailable.

scenarios.title: Pure legal lookup should not be forced into a practical two-part answer
scenarios.prompt: 근로기준법 제74조 내용하고 시행령이나 해석상 기본 취지만 간단히 정리해줘. 판례나 현실 분쟁 얘기까지는 필요 없어.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Overcomplicates the response, adds practical dispute speculation the user did not ask for, or forces a `General legal answer` / `Practical answer` split even though this is just a pure legal lookup.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Classifies the prompt as a pure legal lookup, routes through the narrow law or interpretation tools, answers directly from the retrieved material, and does not force the two-part answer shape.

scenarios.title: Real-world question should separate legal rule from practical treatment
scenarios.prompt: 육아휴직 끝나고 복직시키긴 하는데 사실상 한직으로 보내려는 상황 같아. 법적으로는 뭐가 원칙이고, 실제 분쟁에서는 어떻게 보이는지도 같이 설명해줘.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Gives only a blended answer, summarizes the statute without separating principle from practice, or drifts into unsupported practical advice.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Classifies the prompt as a real-world situation, retrieves the governing law plus directly relevant precedent, interpretation, appeal, or tribunal material when available, and separates the response into `General legal answer` and `Practical answer`.

scenarios.title: Real-world question without directly relevant support should not invent practice
scenarios.prompt: 동네 체육시설 운영 계약에 이런 특약이 있으면 실제 소송에서 무조건 무효라고 봐도 돼? 직접 맞는 판례가 없을 수도 있는데 현실적으로도 같이 말해줘.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Guesses how the court would probably react, presents a practical outcome as if certain, or fills the answer with unsupported litigation strategy.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Classifies this as a real-world situation, gives a `General legal answer` from the governing contract or civil-law rules, looks for directly relevant precedent or interpretation support, and if that support is missing it explicitly holds back the `Practical answer` instead of guessing.
